channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: I swapped my $10,000 camera for the Oppo Find X9 Ultra's teleconverter kit at a Champions League soccer match — here’s what happened
item.description: I photographed the Champions League with the Oppo Find X9 Ultra and its teleconverter lens — and the results are wild.

item.title: Hackers hijack Google Ads to spread phishing campaign spoofing top GoDaddy tool
item.description: A fake ManageWP site is being advertised on Google, leading to credential theft.

item.title: Thinking about buying the LG C6 OLED TV? Ask our reviewers anything, from which panel it uses to how it compares to other 2026 TVs
item.description: Our official LG C6 OLED TV verdict is in — here's your chance to ask our expert reviewers your questions in a live Q&A.

item.title: Best Printers for Any Home-Office Need (2026): Brother, HP, and More
item.description: Need to print labels, stickers, stacks of pages, color photos, or even a textured mug? I tested the best home printers, including ink-tank, cartridge, and laser options.

item.title: Best Bug Spray (2026), Tested and Reviewed
item.description: Our writer tried some of the most popular insect repellents during runs, hikes, and evening walks. These are the ones we recommend.

item.title: You asked, and Spotify listened — this popular Spotify feature is finally rolling out to new markets after years of begging the music platform
item.description: After a slow rollout, Spotify is finally expanding AI DJ to Austria, France, Germany, and more.

item.title: Phone reviews roundup — the best new handsets to buy in May, including two mind-blowing camera phones and an 'incredibly long-lasting Android phone that won’t break the bank'
item.description: A whistle-stop tour of all the new phones we've tested, and exactly what we thought of them.

item.title: La souris ergonomique Logitech Lift qui soulage les douleurs au poignet se retrouve bradée à -53%
item.description: La Logitech Lift est une souris verticale principalement utilisée en bureautique pour soulager les tendinites et autres douleurs. Elle se retrouve à 37,23 euros au lieu de 79,99 euros sur Boulanger.

item.title: Surprise cosmique : une nouvelle famille de trous noirs géants émerge dans les ondes gravitationnelles
item.description: Et si les plus gros trous noirs n’étaient pas nés si grands ? Les ondes gravitationnelles racontent aujourd’hui une histoire différente, bien plus mouvementée.

item.title: How I Fixed My Webcam Lighting for Zoom Calls (2026)
item.description: I have a horrendous lighting setup in my home office, but as a mixed-use room, my options for fixing it were limited.

item.title: Thousands of Vibe-Coded Apps Expose Corporate and Personal Data on the Open Web
item.description: Companies like Lovable, Base44, Replit, and Netlify use AI to let anyone build a web app in seconds—and in thousands of cases, spill highly sensitive data onto the public internet.

item.title: This Reggae Band Is in a Nightmare Battle Against AI Slop Remixes
item.description: When Stick Figure’s six-year-old song shot up the charts, the band was thrilled. But its viral moment was spurred by unauthorized AI remixes.

item.title: Someone turned the Epstein files into a public library. Here’s how to see it
item.description: The temporary Manhattan installation includes more than 17,000 pounds of records and evidence tied to Jeffrey Epstein. A new library is opening up in New York City this Friday, but rather than books, the space will house 3,437 volumes and roughly 3.5 million pages of the Epstein Files.

item.title: Why relying on unverified chatbot financial advice leads to costly errors
item.description: Stop treating ChatGPT like your "mate down the pub" for financial advice.

item.title: The ITSM complexity crisis and how to control it
item.description: Preventing technical debt in modern ITSM platforms requires governance, disciplined development, and platform health management.

item.title: 11 Best Sunscreens, WIRED Tested and Reviewed
item.description: We put 36 sunscreens to the test during summer hikes, spring ski days, and beachside hangs. Out of all the mineral, chemical, and spray varieties we tried, these are our top picks.

item.title: Bottom G Wants You to Know He’s More Than Just ‘Gay Andrew Tate’
item.description: Brian Michael Hinds found accidental internet fame through a resemblance to the controversial manosphere figure. He’s still wrestling with what to do with it.

item.title: Trump’s latest logos leave out Vice President Vance
item.description: Increasingly, the president’s email fundraising is branded only for him. Since Donald Trump named then-Senator JD Vance of Ohio his running mate in July 2024, his campaign logo has included both of their last names placed within a rectangular frame. In fundraising emails sent to the president’s mailing list last month, though, a different version of the logo included just one name: Trump....

item.title: J’ai vu le magnifique cabriolet électrique de BYD : le Denza Z plus rapide qu’une Porsche et une recharge en 5 minutes
item.description: BYD vient de frapper un grand coup avec la Denza Z, un cabriolet électrique de plus de 1 000 chevaux que j'ai pu voir en Chine. De quoi venir chasser directement sur les terres de Porsche. Mais attention, la puissance brute ne fait pas tout.

item.title: 'These findings aren’t isolated incidents': A shocking number of workers would be willing to sell out their company data for money
item.description: Amid rising cyber attacks and AI-driven threats, companies also need to tackle insider threats that could be leaking sensitive data.

item.title: 'Workforce reductions may create budget room, but they do not create return': Gartner warns companies relying on layoffs to free up room for AI may be caught out in the long run
item.description: Companies are investing in agentic AI and laying off human workers, but Gartner says this is the wrong way to go about it.

item.title: Un écran gaming 27 pouces, QHD et 200 Hz pour moins de 140 euros, c’est possible grâce à cette offre
item.description: Ajustable, inclinable avec une connectique complète, cet écran de 27 pouces de Gigabyte satisfera les gamers pour un petit prix de seulement 137,85 euros grâce à cette offre.

item.title: Galaxy Watch : les montres Samsung peuvent savoir si vous allez vous évanouir
item.description: Samsung indique que ses montres connectées sont capables de prédire un risque de malaise vagal avec une précision proche de 85 %.

item.title: Dell et Lenovo passent une nouvelle étape pour soutenir Linux face à Windows
item.description: Dell et Lenovo ont rejoint le Linux Vendor Firmware Service pour améliorer le support de Linux sur leurs PC.

item.title: Adieu le thermique : le Zero LS1 prouve que le scooter de 2026 sera électrique [Sponso]
item.description: Que se passe-t-il quand le leader mondial de la moto électrique s'attaque au segment urbain ? Le résultat s'appelle Zero LS1 : un deux-roues taillé pour la ville qui concentre tout le savoir-faire technologique de Zero Motorcycles.

item.title: Score the Apple iPhone 17 for free with T-Mobile — no trade-in required
item.description: How to get free Apple iPhone. Get the iPhone 17 for free from T-Mobile when you switch and bring your number on an Experience Beyond or Better Value plan.

item.title: A PC trade-in rush is on the way—and it’s coming at the worst possible time
item.description: As millions of pandemic-era PCs near the end of their lifespan, consumers are running into soaring hardware prices driven by the AI boom. Just as they did with televisions, many people used the pandemic as an excuse to upgrade their PC or laptop.

item.title: This Gen Z film distributor is using influencer events to get his peers going to the movies
item.description: Gen Z isn’t giving up on movie theaters, and one scrappy indie distributor is betting social media and IRL experiences can prove it. Peter Gold has always loved making films. While attending film school in New York, he became involved with a film called Our Hero Balthazar, directed by Oscar Boyson, known for his work as an executive producer on Uncut Gems....

item.title: Portable power stations explained
item.description: Learn what portable power stations are, how to charge them, and how to use them with examples like Anker 521 and EcoFlow Delta 3.

item.title: There Is No Evidence the Trump Assassination Attempts Were Staged. People Still Believe They Were
item.description: Elements of the right and the left are united in the baseless belief that two attempts on Donald Trump's life were staged.

item.title: Amandaland season 2 finally introduces the 'no-nonsense' missing character we needed to meet the most — but now the strongest character in the series has vanished
item.description: BBC comedy Motherland spinoff Amandaland is back for its much-anticipated second season — but it's now swapped one missing character for another.

item.title: 'You're watching the wrong show': The Boys showrunner Eric Kripke hits back at fan claims that its fifth and final season is just full of 'filler episodes'
item.description: The Boys' showrunner has questioned why fans aren't enjoying its last season, and his comments have gone down as well as you'd expect.

item.title: Shop ’til you bot: Google, OpenAI, and the race to build agentic commerce
item.description: Control shopping, control the world. How leaders at Google and OpenAI are thinking about the AI-powered future of shopping—and when it’ll be here. Last September, OpenAI and Shopify made an announcement that sent ripples throughout the retail industry: They were partnering to launch Instant Checkout—a feature that would let people complete purchases directly within ChatGPT. ...

item.title: This 3D-printed cast shapes to your arm—and makes healing a broken bone more comfortable
item.description: Castomize’s open cast is breathable, lightweight, and fully waterproof. Breaking your arm or wrist typically comes with another layer of misery: wearing a hot, itchy cast that makes showering tedious and swimming impossible. But in Singapore, patients at some hospitals and clinics now have another option—an open, 3D-printed cast that’s more comfortable to wear and fully waterproof....

item.title: Fonds de solidarité FTQ | Une IA française pour trouver les technos de demain
item.description: Le Fonds de solidarité FTQ misera désormais sur une intelligence artificielle (IA) appelée Jolt Ninja pour identifier les entreprises technologiques prometteuses qui permettront d’accélérer la croissance de ses partenaires. L’IA en question a été créée par le fonds d’investissement français Jolt Capital, qui a fait l’annonce de ce partenariat à ses tout nouveaux bureaux montréalais....

item.title: C’est vert, c’est rond et ça fait plaisir : préparez-vous à une belle surprise au démarrage de votre Xbox
item.description: Inchangé depuis 2020 et l'arrivée des Xbox Series sur le marché, le jingle de démarrage Xbox va être entièrement modifié à compter du 13 mai 2026. Moins fade, plus verte, mais peut-être un peu simpliste, la nouvelle animation se veut en tout cas symbolique d'un changement d'ère.

item.title: The 4.5-star-rated and number one best-selling Breville Barista Express coffee machine is 20% off at Amazon
item.description: Amazon has the excellent Breville the Barista Express coffee machine for just $50 more than the record-low price.

item.title: The Magic: The Gathering Avatar The Last Airbender Jumpstart Booster Box hits record-low price on Amazon — save $17
item.description: The Magic: The Gathering Avatar Jumpstart Booster Box is $82.13 at Amazon, its lowest-ever price on the site.

item.title: Samsung finally rolls out One UI 8.5 to the Galaxy 25, S24, and more — here's the full list of compatible devices
item.description: The latest major Samsung software update is now moving beyond the Galaxy S26 series and landing on other phones and tablets.

item.title: I was worried that the Gothic remake would water down the unapologetically tricky 2001 original, but seven hours hands-on has put my mind at ease
item.description: The cruel world of Gothic remains as prickly as ever in the new remake, but that’s not a bad thing.
